decisions.title: Prioritize Canvas V2 Core Experience over Feature Expansion
decisions.context: Multiple Canvas features in flight (Pass/Fail buttons ENG-9437, run_child_canvas helper ENG-9506) while core navigation (ENG-9882, ENG-9872) and stability need attention. North Star = Decisions Captured. Canvas must enable faster decision cycles before adding features.

arguments.for: Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar. Current feature velocity risks fragmenting user experience. Decision capture requires reliable, intuitive workspace first.
arguments.against: Customer commitments on Pass/Fail and family integration may be delayed. Could slow momentum with early adopters expecting feature parity with V1.

decisions.title: Commit to Sift Edge GA Timeline Despite GUI Table View Scope
decisions.context: ENG-9883 (Sift Edge GUI Table View) signals continued pre-GA work. Edge is critical to 'Embed Deeper' pillar - enabling decisions at hardware level. Need clear GA date or scope cut decision.
decisions.blockedBy: Unclear minimum viable feature set for GA. Table view necessity vs nice-to-have not documented.

arguments.for: Edge represents moat-building technology. Early GA captures competitive advantage in embedded analytics space. Customer pipeline needs reference deployments.
arguments.against: Rushing GA risks quality issues that damage 'decisions captured' metric if users can't trust edge data. Table view may be table stakes for analyst workflows.

decisions.title: Standardize Family Data Architecture Across Explore V2 and Canvas
decisions.context: Heavy family-related work across products: ENG-9893 (CX2 fleet QA), ENG-7954 (Sigma stats), ENG-9531/9534/9530/9529 (candidate runs), ENG-6408 (table panels), DES-61 (alignment points). Fragmented implementation risks inconsistent UX and tech debt.

arguments.for: Family comparisons are core to 'Signal>Evidence>Decision' flow. Unified architecture enables reliable cross-product decisions and reduces maintenance burden.
arguments.against: Will slow individual feature delivery short-term. Each product team optimized for their use case - standardization may compromise specific workflows.

decisions.title: Defer Python Rules Enhancements for E2 Core Stability
decisions.context: Significant E2 infrastructure work: ENG-7847 (streaming aggregates), ENG-7859 (ad hoc aggregated time series), ENG-9659 (memtable), ENG-9667 (mergesort). Metrics Ingester (ENG-6792) suggests Python integration, but no Python Rules tickets visible. Core query performance impacts all decision workflows.

arguments.for: E2 performance directly impacts time-to-decision (North Star metric). Stability issues force users to export data, breaking 'Embed Deeper' value prop. Infrastructure must support scale before new rule types.
arguments.against: Python Rules differentiate Sift vs BI tools - key to 'Build the Moat'. Customers with ML/custom logic needs may churn without this capability. Competitive gap widens.

decisions.title: Resolve SCIM Reliability Issues Before FedRAMP Certification Push
decisions.context: ENG-9788 (Impulse Space SCIM deactivation RCA) reveals enterprise identity integration fragility. ENG-9662 (FedRAMP Amplitude requirements) and ENG-9694 (FIPS EBS encryption) signal compliance push. SCIM bugs undermine trust needed for public sector expansion.

arguments.for: Enterprise reliability is prerequisite for 'Embed Deeper'. SCIM failures cause user lockouts, destroying decision capture workflow. FedRAMP without stable identity is liability risk.
arguments.against: FedRAMP timeline may be externally driven (contract deadlines). SCIM edge cases affect small user subset. Encryption/compliance work has clearer audit requirements.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Product strategy fragmentation requires coordination overhead. 30 active Linear tickets across 7 product areas with unclear prioritization.
alerts: Zero time allocated for decision-making on 5 open strategic choices - decisions blocking execution
Family data architecture appearing in 9 separate tickets suggests duplicated design discussions
No visible roadmap synchronization - Canvas, Edge, E2, and Platform teams operating independently
FedRAMP compliance work (ENG-9662, ENG-9694) may have external deadlines not captured in Linear

events.title: Decision: Resolve SCIM Reliability Priority
events.description: Commit to SCIM stabilization sprint or accept risk for FedRAMP timeline

events.title: Decision: Sift Edge GA Scope Definition
events.description: Define minimum feature set for GA or push to Q3. Table view ENG-9883 blocks decision.

events.title: Decision: Canvas V2 Feature Freeze Assessment
events.description: Review Pass/Fail buttons, navigation work, and core stability tradeoffs

events.title: Decision: Python Rules vs E2 Performance Priority
events.description: Allocate Q2 engineering capacity between infrastructure (streaming aggregates ENG-7847) and differentiation (Python integration)

events.title: Milestone: Family Data Architecture RFC Complete
events.description: Unified approach for ENG-9893, ENG-9531, ENG-6408, DES-61 to prevent rework

events.title: Gate: FedRAMP Phase 1 Infrastructure Review
events.description: Verify FIPS encryption (ENG-9694), Amplitude requirements (ENG-9662), SCIM stability before committing to ATO timeline

events.title: Milestone: Explore V2 Performance Baseline Established
events.description: Streaming aggregates (ENG-7847), memtable updates (ENG-9659) deployed. P95 latency targets defined for North Star tracking.

events.title: Gate: Canvas V2 Beta Exit Criteria Review
events.description: Assess decision capture metrics, stability (ENG-9870, ENG-9730 resolved), navigation complete (ENG-9882, ENG-9872) before GA promotion

events.title: Deadline: Sift Edge GA Launch Decision
events.description: Final commit to Q2 GA or formally push to Q3 with revised embedded strategy

events.title: Milestone: Python Rules MVP Shipped (If Prioritized)
events.description: Depends on Apr 10 prioritization decision. Metrics Ingester (ENG-6792) foundation enables user-facing rule authoring.

events.title: Gate: FedRAMP ATO Submission Readiness
events.description: All compliance requirements (encryption, identity, audit logging) operational. Begins 3-6 month authorization process.

events.title: Milestone: Decisions Captured Per Customer Baseline
events.description: North Star metric instrumentation complete across Canvas, Explore V2, and Edge. Quarterly tracking begins.

events.title: Meeting: 2026 Strategy Mid-Year Review
events.description: Assess Signal>Evidence>Decision framework effectiveness, pillar progress, and H2 pivots needed
